rows.label: tev018291_MSG0001
rows.name: Aw, geez. I dunno what I'm gonna do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0002
rows.name:
A guy by the name of Oll
Valdileo asked me to make a
weapon that even a Bias can use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0003
rows.name:
But I don't know beans about the Bias,
or how they fight, or even what level
of tech they're comfortable with![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0004
rows.name:
I've discussed it with the
guys, but no one has any clue
what we should make for them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0005
rows.name:
And when I ask Oll what he wants, the
only feedback I get is "something good."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0006
rows.name:
So what should I make?
Do you have any ideas?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_JNK0010
rows.name: Suggest High Tech[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Cedric to make an advanced laser weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_JNK0020
rows.name: Suggest Primitive[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Cedric to make a basic weapon like a club.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0007
rows.name: I...guess that makes sense?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0008
rows.name:
After all, they say that their enemies in
the Cavern Clan are stealing human weapons
and using them without any modifications.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0009
rows.name:
I guess they're more
nimble than they look.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0010
rows.name:
Thanks a lot. I'm gonna put all of my
weapon-crafting skills into this baby![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0011
rows.name:
That Oll Valdileo is going to end
up with one heck of a laser rifle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0012
rows.name:
Heck, maybe it'll even help deepen
our friendship with the Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0013
rows.name:
I guess that makes sense. I mean, as
opposed to a laser rifle or something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Yeah, you're right. I should make a
simple weapon that allows the Bias to use
their great strength to maximum advantage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0015
rows.name:
Bludgeoning weapons are way outside
of my field of expertise, but I
think I can figure something out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0016
rows.name:
Heh. I'm going to make Oll Valdileo
a club like he's never seen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018291_MSG0017
rows.name:
Heck, maybe it'll even help deepen
our friendship with the Bias.[ST:wait ]
